title: Push and create PR for kickoff CI verification feature

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--ratatui-tui
comments.content: Result: Switched to Viewport::Inline(14), clears viewport area after walkthrough. Reordered run() so TUI happens before any fs::create_dir_all/fs::write — Esc exits cleanly. 146 tests pass, clippy/fmt clean.
